developer_response.body:
Hi Babytooth_04,

Thank you for your great review! Let us help you with the height issue. If you go to the Settings column and place the Bobby on said column, you'll find an option to calibrate your height. This should adjust the game to your correct height.

If you've already tried this, please send us an email at support@trebuchet.fun and we’ll do our best to help you troubleshoot the issue.

reviews.review_description: I’ve played this game for a long time. Doing many challenges and just replaying the game. But there’s always been an issue that just kinda stops me from playing. The issue is the room scale in the game which can be used in the settings. It is pretty useful making a bigger room and letting you move around much more. But it’s really bad at tracking your actual room. Most of the time my boundary will be a decently wide rectangle going pretty far down my house. Which it does track but it always makes the boundary sideways. Making me hit the tv and get stuck in a tiny box. I’ve tried to reset my boundary and reset where I’m looking, but it just doesn’t work. And I’ve already tried to reset the game and my VR as well. Kinda just seems like the game has this as a flaw that you can’t fix. But in the end I love it and I can’t wait for the next part to come out.

I had lots of fun playing this game, but I got some ideas, like the ability to upgrade yourself to be able to craft things better/faster, maybe this can be possible by using tools, or maybe something like a money counter or storage that makes you able to see how much money you have and put on/out money.

But still I love the gameplay and the idea!!

Hi MartinBaran,

Thank you for your kind words about our game!

The code had indeed expired, but we quickly replaced it with a new one. We do this to encourage people to join and stay active on Discord to get the game. It’s our way of saying "Thanks for being here!" When this happens, users let us know and we usually update the code shortly after being informed that it has expired.

We appreciate you being part of our Discord community and we're happy to hear you're enjoying Prison Boss! 😄

reviews.review_description: But I can’t make a cigarette in the tutorial and I don’t know why WHAT DOES SWIPE YOUR THUMB MEAN

developer_response.body:
Hi americancheese123,

We're sorry you're having a hard time rolling the cigarette. Let us try to help!

Swipe your thumbs mean doing back and forth motion with both joysticks at the same time. Just like you would do in real life to roll a piece of paper into a cylinder. Just do the back and forth motion repeatedly with the joysticks once you have put the tobacco inside the teared piece of paper.

Please shoot us an email at support@trebuchet.fun if you need more help, we'll be happy to provide further assistance!

Hi jhjayhill,

We're really sorry you're having a hard time accessing the settings. To access the settings you need to put the little "Bobby" on the setting's column, just like you would put it in one of the little prisons to start up your game.

If you're still having issues accessing the settings, please reach out to us at support@trebuchet.fun and we will gladly assist you so you can access the settings and play the game the way it's intended to be played!

reviews.review_description:
Quite a boring game, you carry out repetitive tasks so that you can move to a differently decorated cell to carry out more of the same repetitive tasks to move to a differently decorated cell, etc. etc. 
I played for a while expecting something exciting or different to happen but no...just more of the same tasks.   On the plus side it's quite realistic because I imagine being in prison can be boring and repetitive.

No matter what I did I couldn't get my character to roll the cigarette. Never before have I seen such a stupid game that you can't even complete the most basic of objectives. Complete waste of money. Don't buy. Of course I should have read the reviews but didn't so got screwed bad

developer_response.body:
Hi savitron.2023,

We're sorry to see you've had a bad experience while playing Prison Boss. Crafting cigarettes is normally fairly easy. Here's the steps to do so:

You’ll need:
- Paper
- Tobacco

Crafting steps:

- Tear the paper in half.
- Sprinkle some tobacco on it.
- Grab the paper and tobacco, and repeatedly roll the joysticks with your thumbs. You can simply move the joysticks forward and backward repeatedly.
- Bring the half-rolled cigarette to your character's head for a final slurp.

If you're still having a hard time rolling the cigarettes after doing these steps, please reach out to our support email so we can assist further: support@trebuchet.fun

We hope you can give Prison Boss a second chance in the future! 😊

The recent Quest OS updates seem to have created new unwanted interactions with our save system. If you are willing to help us in our research, you can get in touch with us at support@trebuchet.fun. We'll make a developer post when the issues are resolved.

reviews.review_description: I can't delete my save data and I'm to small in the game to get to settings

developer_response.body:
Hi bjgunz2008,

This is a really odd issue. Let's try to fix it!

1. Try to calibrate with the Oculus button (hold the button for 2 seconds). 

2. If you're seated, try standing up. If it calibrates you small it may be that the game is set to "standing" and that you are seated.

3. Try uninstalling the game. Before reinstalling, you can try this fix: https://www.androidcentral.com/how-enable-cloud-save-backup-oculus-quest ! Then, reinstall the game and check if the problem is fixed.

4. Delete your save on your Oculus account if the cloud save is "on".

5. If you're talking about the "in-game" save, you have to put it in the shredder and press the red button. There is a maximum of 5 active saves in game. Does the game asks you to destroy a save before leaving? Is this where you are stuck?

Please send us an email at support@trebuchet.fun to confirm if one of these options worked for you. If this issue isn't fixed, please send us an email stating your issue and the fixes you tried.

We really hope this helped and that you will be able to fix this annoying issue!

reviews.review_description:
The game plays quite well, but is rather short and sometimes buggy.
- Moving furniture is a bit buggy, after moving it doesn't change the color back from blue.
- Sometimes the cursor disappears 
- Moving items seems to lag. 
It also doesn't utilize the full potential of the touch controllers. The hands don't animate as you press the trigger, they only have 2 states, open and close.

I wouldn't buy it for the full price, wait for a sale.

developer_response.body:
Hi RouNNdeL,

We hear you! Thanks for the feedback and clear list of what should be improved. We appreciate it. 🙂

Get the game if you want, your money your chose I requested and refund, but it was not approved so I can’t get my money back even tho I don’t play the game any more waste of money wouldn’t recommend this game if you play the whole game in less then 8 hours then waste of money and think like I said earlier

reviews.review_description:
To start out with the cons. You don’t want to get busted not just because it’s part of the game, but because the alarm is so annoying. I don’t know if it’s because of the PTSD from the fire alarms from college going off constantly or it’s just because it’s a fire alarm. They could’ve done better such as having a whistle blow or something that isn’t a fire alarm. My other issue is buying, I hate when I do a mass sell or order because not only I have to reorganize my entire cell but everything gets thrown onto the ground, well being 6 feet tall and more I constantly have to bend over and sometimes just sit on the floor to pick up all the stuff just for it to happen again. Finally the cell, sure it’s small I get that because it’s prison, but holy poo if you’re gonna have a full size wardrobe in the game plus more large furniture at least make the cell larger, I don’t mind having to move in person to get to places nor using my joystick to move in other games but if you’re going to have large furniture I rather not have to sacrifice the large UI you have for the buy/sell/jobs and not have it work because I have a cabinet in the way of the exit button and same with the menu soap thing, at least allow me to get a larger cell through some type of upgrade system like “bribe the guard to get a bigger cell” sorta deal. Also this is the only game that legitimately hurts my eyes, I don’t know if it’s because I’m constantly looking around or the fact I have to keep adjusting my VR head gear (I should also say I only started VR two weeks ago from today, I got this for a graduation gift from a family member) Now, if you are waiting for the pros here I go with a mixture of cons still. I love the crafting, it’s really fun to actually craft things by hand, making cigs is one of the most basic things but pouring tobacco onto paper is the harder than making a cake on here… I enjoy the fact I have to constantly be on edge for the guards and keep a watch out but holy moly make it more random instead of predetermined on every level and also make the nights longer!!!! I’m so tired of having to make sure the three guards pass me for it to just turn day time, it’s almost like I might as well go to the next day when the first guard comes. I love the music, it goes really nicely with each level. 

Now, I’m not saying this is a bad game but there’s just a lot to it that makes it frustrating. Honestly if you want to play this game go for it, but after two hours you aren’t going to have the full on experience and that’s when you can’t refund the game. It does get better with how you can craft newer things but it’s just the fact that this game is hard to even tell if it’ll be fun just by the photos and YouTube gameplay of a teenage constantly talking/yelling and narrating what he’s doing it’s annoying enough it still doesn’t show if this game will be fun. So in my opinion/advice and I do this with every game, set a timer for a hour and thirty minutes and then immediately exit the game and think about if you feel like you’ll get back into the game in the future and enjoy it before you commit to keeping the game.
The desk and safe brake if you pot you hand close to them it is fun but good

Hi XXX_bl4ze,

If you found our game fun, can you please give us a 5 stars review? It would really help us! Thank you! 😊
